  as={"h1"}

  children={"create (v2)"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/rest/financing/v2/applications"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.create</b> authority for authenticated user

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>

type","enum":["CONSOLIDATION"]}},"title":"FinancingLiabilityFinancing"}},"title":"FinancingLiabilityBase"},"order":{"type":"object","required":["totalPrice"],"properties":{"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"financing":{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"installment":{"type":"object","properties":{"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"preferredMonths":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Code of product set"}},"title":"FinancingInstallmentSettings"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Order financing type","enum":["INSTALLMENT"]}},"title":"FinancingV2OrderFinancing"},"items":{"type":"array","description":"List of items on the order","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Item name"},"producer":{"type":"string","description":"Producer"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Item quantity. If empty, considered as 1"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"}},"title":"FinancingOrderItem"}},"merchantOrders":{"type":"array","description":"Merchant orders managed by mediator","items":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"businessId":{"type":"string","description":"Company identification number","minLength":0,"maxLength":8,"pattern":"\\d*"},"items":{"type":"array","description":"Information about particular item's of merchant order","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Internal code for item (internal to e-shop). If empty, considered as 1"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"}},"title":"FinancingOrderItem"}},"logo":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Merchant name","minLength":0,"maxLength":60},"number":{"type":"string","description":"Internal order number of the merchant (e-shop, POS shop). ","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"url":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the merchant's web site (e-shop)","minLength":0,"maxLength":1000}},"title":"FinancingMerchantOrder"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier, specified by the partner (eshop, POS shop)","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"specificSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"specific symbol","minLength":0,"maxLength":10},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","pattern":"^\\d{0,10}$"}},"title":"FinancingV2OrderBase"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Type of the financed subject","enum":["CASH","LIABILITY","ORDER","WALLET"]},"wallet":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"financing":{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"shoppingWallet":{"type":"object","properties":{"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Code of product set"}},"title":"FinancingSettings"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Wallet financing type","enum":["SHOPPING_WALLET"]}},"title":"FinancingWalletFinancing"}},"title":"FinancingWalletBase"}},"title":"FinancingV2SubjectBase"},"originationContext":{"type":"object","required":["channel"],"properties":{"channel":{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"online":{"type":"object","properties":{"approvedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website (from HCO gateway) after application approval.","minLength":0,"maxLength":1000},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for obtaining important updates about application (approval, rejection, storno, etc.).","minLength":0,"maxLength":1000},"rejectedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website (from HCO gateway) after application rejection.","minLength":0,"maxLength":1000}},"title":"FinancingV2MerchantUrls"},"phone":{"type":"object","properties":{"callRequest":{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"dates":{"type":"array","description":"Call request preferred dates","items":{"type":"object","required":["date"],"properties":{"date":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Wrapped call date"}},"title":"FinancingV2CallDate"}},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Type of call request","enum":["DATES"]}},"title":"FinancingV2CallRequest"},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for obtaining important updates about application (approval, rejection, storno, etc.).","minLength":0,"maxLength":1000}},"title":"FinancingV2PhoneSettings"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Type of origination channel","enum":["ONLINE","PHONE"]}},"title":"FinancingV2OriginationChannel"},"extendedData":{"type":"array","description":"Additional information from partners","items":{"type":"object","required":["key","value"],"properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"object"}},"title":"KeyValue"}},"precheckIds":{"type":"array","description":"Array of all precheck ids related to this application. See precheck operations and it's response (PrecheckResults).","items":{"type":"string"}},"sourceId":{"type":"string","description":"Source id"}},"title":"FinancingV2OriginationContextRequest"}},"title":"FinancingV2ApplicationRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["id","status","workflowSteps"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier in HCO"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"Application status","enum":["CREATED","VERIFICATION","PRESCORED","APPROVED","REJECTED","ALTERNATIVE","CONFIRMED","CANCELLED"]},"workflowSteps":{"type":"array","description":"Collection of application process actions available for current application status","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"cancellation":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ANOTHER_APPLICATION_IN_PROGRESS","DIFFERENT_REGISTER_DATA","INCONSISTENT_VERIFICATION_DATA","MISMATCH_REPRESENTATIVE","MISSING_OFFER","PARAMETERS_CHANGED","UNDEFINED","UNSUPPORTED_CLIENT_SEGMENT","UNSUPPORTED_PROCESS","VERIFICATION_INVALID","WITHDRAWAL_FROM_CONTRACT"]}},"title":"Cancellation"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Workflow code","enum":["CANCELLATION","DELIVERY","REDIRECT"]},"mandatory":{"type":"boolean","description":"Is the step mandatory"},"priority":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Priority of the workflowstep"},"redirect":{"type":"object","properties":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Redirect user to this URL to complete this application."}},"title":"FinancingRedirectUrl"}},"title":"FinancingWorkflowStep"}}},"title":"FinancingApplicationBase"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
